question.label: Reset timing
question.name: Is now a bad time for this, or should we pick it up later?
question.description: Directly resets a non-functional session after repeated skips.

assessment.note: [SHALLOW] Skipped response to the reset question provides no clarity signal. [SESSION NON-FUNCTIONAL: 3+ consecutive non-answers. Queue cleared.]

new_queue.label: Priority ranking
new_queue.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?
